name: Scaloppine of Sweetbreads in Cream
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground white pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the sweetbreads into 1/2-inch slices. Season them with salt and pepper, and dust lightly with flour.
2. Heat the butter in a large frying pan over fairly high heat until the foam subsides. Brown the sweetbreads for about 3 minutes on each side. Transfer them to a hot serving platter and keep warm.
3. Add the shallot to the butter in the pan, cook until it begins to color, add the sherry, and reduce to half its quantity.
4. Add the cream and continue cooking until slightly reduced and thickened. Taste and correct seasoning.
5. Arrange a few pieces of the sweetbreads on each of the slices of toast and spoon a little of the sauce over each.
Serves 6.
